title: Dip, swim or float for a cause
description: GARDENROUTE NEWS - It is not a race, it is a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDENROUTE NEWS - It is not a race, it is a gathering of remembrance and celebration. Set to take place on 11 October, George will experience the Secret Swim 2025 for the very first time.","html":"GARDENROUTE NEWS - It is not a race, it is a gathering of remembrance and celebration. Set to take place on 11 October, George will experience the Secret Swim 2025 for the very first time."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Plettenberg Bay is included as a Southern Cape venue, and there are 15 other secret locations across South Africa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Women from across South Africa will unite for this event. All proceeds will go in support of ILoveBoobies, a non-profit organisation founded in 2016, through which 1000 life-saving breast cancer screenings are funded every year for women from underserved communities.","html":"Women from across South Africa will unite for this event. All proceeds will go in support of ILoveBoobies, a non-profit organisation founded in 2016, through which 1000 life-saving breast cancer screenings are funded every year for women from underserved communities."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Unlike traditional swims, the Secret Swim is not a race. The participants receive their venue pin location at 23:59 on Friday 10 October and gather the next morning for some fun for a cause."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The programme includes registration and pre-swim activities from 07:30, a welcome and safety briefing at 07:45, and an optional group photo (topless from behind) before the swimmers take the plunge at 08:00.","html":"The programme includes registration and pre-swim activities from 07:30, a welcome and safety briefing at 07:45, and an optional group photo (topless from behind) before the swimmers take the plunge at 08:00."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“Whether it’s a quick dip, a relaxed float or a full swim, women of all ages and abilities are encouraged to join,” says event organiser Isla Maree."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Female lifeguards and bag-watchers will be on duty. Afterward, participants may enjoy a picnic at the venue. Entry is R200, with pre-registration required.","html":"Female lifeguards and bag-watchers will be on duty. Afterward, participants may enjoy a picnic at the venue. Entry is R200, with pre-registration required."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Visit www.iloveboobies.co.za to enter for the event.","html":"Visit www.iloveboobies.co.za to enter for the event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Last year’s event at Clifton in Cape Town.","html":"Last year’s event at Clifton in Cape Town."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All proceeds will go in support of ILoveBoobies, a non-profit organisation founded in 2016.","html":"All proceeds will go in support of ILoveBoobies, a non-profit organisation founded in 2016."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Clifton beach was hit with pink during last year’s event.","html":"Clifton beach was hit with pink during last year’s event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
